series.title: [PATCH] tests: don't build audio tests when no audio drivers are

review.summary: The change is correct on its face: it avoids descending into tests/audio when audio drivers are disabled, which matches the reported Meson failure caused by an empty @INPUT@ expansion. I did not identify a functional regression from the diff alone. Validation is limited because the patch did not apply cleanly in the provided state and no build was run.

stages.A: Patch intent is clear and narrowly scoped: skip audio test build setup when there are no audio drivers.
stages.B: Code-path review of the shown hunk did not reveal logic errors; the added condition matches the failure mode described in the commit message.
stages.C: Regression risk appears low because the change only broadens an existing early-exit guard for tests/audio.
stages.D: Tooling signals are incomplete: checkpatch reported corruption/wrapping and git am failed, so exact application context could not be verified.
stages.E: Given the diff content, the patch is suitable as-is; follow-up should be limited to ensuring the mail transport preserves line formatting so the series applies cleanly.

issues: ERROR: patch seems to be corrupt (line wrapped?)

diff:
From git@z Thu Jan  1 00:00:00 1970
Subject: [PATCH] tests: don't build audio tests when no audio drivers are
 enabled
From: Anton Kuchin <antonkuchin@nebius.com>
Date: Fri, 27 Mar 2026 16:45:51 +0000
Message-Id: <DB8P190MB07142E1BA8DEEA8B2E41D5B2DB57A@DB8P190MB0714.EURP190.PROD.OUTLOOK.COM>
MIME-Version: 1.0
Content-Type: text/plain; charset="utf-8"
Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit

When there are no audio drivers configure fails with "ERROR: Command
cannot have '@INPUT@', since no input files were specified".

Fixes: 3220b38a8d ("tests: start manual audio backend test")
Signed-off-by: Anton Kuchin <antonkuchin@nebius.com>
---
 tests/audio/meson.build | 2 +-
 1 file changed, 1 insertion(+), 1 deletion(-)

diff --git a/tests/audio/meson.build b/tests/audio/meson.build
index 84754bde22..322755b880 100644
--- a/tests/audio/meson.build
+++ b/tests/audio/meson.build
@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 # SPDX-License-Identifier: GPL-2.0-or-later

-if not have_system
+if not have_system or audio_modinfo_files.length() == 0
   subdir_done()
 endif
-- 
2.34.1
